name: Hook You Up! | The TV Show In Fantasy World
description:
The TV show called 'Hook you Up!' is a show where a male or female searches for it's second half. But in a fantasy world.

When you got summoned to fantasy world called 'Azaria' you were able to defeat the Demon Lord Azarack. Then all of the races united into a single nation. After your tales about your world a group of scientists were able to reconstruct inventions from your world. The place of electricity was replaced by mana orbs and now Azaria looks more modern than medieval.

To celebrate 100th episode of the show, you were invited as you don't have your second half yet.

Source of image: dreamstime
creator: Frikser
